name: graph_bfs
prompt: Write a Rust program implementing breadth-first search (BFS) on a graph. The graph is defined as adjacency list: edges from node 0 to [1, 2], node 1 to [2, 3], node 2 to [], node 3 to [4], node 4 to []. Start BFS from node 0 and print nodes in the order they are visited (space-separated).
